req.title: Device data ingest
req.statement: A registered device shall push Observations via FHIR ingest; unregistered devices shall be rejected.

tests.name: naive_case

doc._raw_response:
```python
"""
Pytest tests for FHIR Observation ingest via registered/unregistered devices.

Requirement: A registered device shall push Observations via FHIR ingest;
             unregistered devices shall be rejected.
"""

import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch

import pytest


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helpers / Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

FHIR_BASE_URL = "https://fhir.example.com/R4"
INGEST_ENDPOINT = f"{FHIR_BASE_URL}/Observation"

REGISTERED_DEVICE_ID = "device-001"
REGISTERED_DEVICE_TOKEN = "valid-token-abc123"

UNREGISTERED_DEVICE_ID = "device-999"
UNREGISTERED_DEVICE_TOKEN = "invalid-token-xyz"


def build_observation_payload(
    device_id: str,
    patient_id: str = "patient-123",
    value: float = 98.6,
    unit: str = "degF",
    loinc_code: str = "8310-5",
    loinc_display: str = "Body temperature",
) -> dict:
    """Return a minimal FHIR R4 Observation resource."""
    return {
        "resourceType": "Observation",
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "status": "final",
        "category": [
            {
                "coding": [
                    {
                        "system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category",
                        "code": "vital-signs",
                        "display": "Vital Signs",
                    }
                ]
            }
        ],
        "code": {
            "coding": [
                {
                    "system": "http://loinc.org",
                    "code": loinc_code,
                    "display": loinc_display,
                }
            ]
        },
        "subject": {"reference": f"Patient/{patient_id}"},
        "effectiveDateTime": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
        "device": {"reference": f"Device/{device_id}"},
        "valueQuantity": {
            "value": value,
